grades.expectation: Response correctly identifies that FTB relief does NOT apply because £510,000 exceeds the £500,000 cap
grades.reason: Response incorrectly states FTB relief applies and uses £625,000 cap instead of £500,000

grades.expectation: Response uses standard rates (not FTB rates) for the calculation
grades.reason: Response uses FTB rates (0% on first £425,000, 5% thereafter) instead of standard rates
Response states £625,000 cap for FTB relief instead of the correct £500,000 cap
Response calculates £4,250 using incorrect FTB rates instead of £15,500 using standard rates

grades.expectation: Response does NOT apply the £300,000 nil-rate FTB band
grades.reason: Response applies FTB relief including the £425,000 nil-rate band when no FTB relief should apply
